title: Mob Mounter
description: Ride any mob using just a saddle!
body:
Want to ride a Cow? An Allay? A Wither? Well Mob Mounter makes it as easy as right clicking a mob with a saddle! Then you can easily move around like you were on a horse!

Note: Some mobs may not work due to them having some other right click interaction, like Villagers. Allays can be ridden if you give them an item to hold first before using the saddle on them.
